https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/%5EJKSE/: Find the latest information on IDX COMPOSITE (^JKSE) including data, charts, related news and more from Yahoo Finance
https://www.idx.co.id/en: IDX menyediakan informasi tentang Bursa Efek Indonesia, termasuk indeks saham, produk pasar modal, dan layanan terkait lainnya.
https://tradingeconomics.com/indonesia/stock-market: The Jakarta Stock Price Index is a major stock market index which tracks the performance of all companies listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange. It is a modified capitalization-weighted index. The Jakarta Stock Price Index has a base value of 100 as of August 10, 1982.
